visual_base.visual_narrative_log: (1) A young woman with dark hair, wearing a white long-sleeved top and a black apron, stands in a large retail warehouse. She holds a cardboard box containing seven pink and red peaches. In the background, there are stacks of green and yellow boxes, and multiple shoppers are visible moving through the aisles under bright industrial lighting. (2) The camera transitions to a close-up shot of the peaches. Seven large, fuzzy peaches with a blend of deep red and soft pink skin are arranged in a red plastic mold inside a cardboard box. One peach has a small blue sticker on it. (3) The scene returns to the woman in the warehouse. She points to the peaches and gestures with her hands while looking directly at the camera. A hand enters the frame from the left, pointing a finger at the peaches. The background remains a busy warehouse interior with shoppers and pallets of goods. (4) The setting shifts to an indoor room, likely a living room. Two women sit at a table; the first woman from the previous scene and another woman wearing a black-and-white zebra-patterned bucket hat. They hold up a whole peach and a slice of peach on a small fork. In the background, several plush toys and household items are visible on shelves under soft indoor lighting. (5) The two women are seen eating the peach slices from a pink heart-shaped plate. They look at each other and the camera, making hand gestures like the 'OK' sign. The woman in the hat holds the large peach close to the camera to show its size and then compares it to the pit.
visual_base.text_narrative_log: (1) [Logo]: COSTCO WHOLESALE. [Slogan]: 7顆裝. [Slogan]: 大又甜水蜜桃. [Subtitle]: 這批的水蜜桃聽說很好吃. (2) [Slogan]: 7顆裝的. [Subtitle]: 也要選七顆裝的. (3) [Subtitle]: 對 它有七顆大的 或者九顆小的 價格都是679. (4) [Subtitle]: 如果是七顆的話 一顆不用100元 97元就有了. (5) [Subtitle]: 但是因為大顆的會比較甜 所以建議大家都選那種7顆的. (6) [Subtitle]: 希望真的好吃 大家水蜜桃怎麼挑. (7) [Slogan]: 要挑果實渾圓. [Subtitle]: 怎麼挑 要挑果實渾圓. (8) [Subtitle]: 沒有黑斑 然後絨毛均勻的. (9) [Subtitle]: 絨毛均勻的. (10) [Subtitle]: 然後以及大家看 有沒有指甲痕 因為我發現有些水果上. (11) [Slogan]: 竟然有指甲痕. [Subtitle]: 竟然有指甲痕 你敢置信 我不敢. (12) [Subtitle]: 我勸大家儘量用看的 不要用摸的 更不要把你的指甲插進去 這樣不好哦. (13) [Subtitle]: 要不要來吃一顆 又大又香甜的水蜜桃啊. (14) [Subtitle]: 它的果核大小長這樣子 給大家比一下. (15) [Subtitle]: 所以其實它的肉量是很多的. (16) [Subtitle]: 肉是很多的呦. (17) [Subtitle]: 那我們切好以後 它這個呢 你剛拿到的話. (18) [Slogan]: 香氣非常的十足. [Subtitle]: 這種脆甜的味道 香氣非常的十足. (19) [Subtitle]: 如果你想要放軟的話 就在常溫放個3-4天 再冰到冰箱就可以了. (20) [Subtitle]: 那你覺得好吃嗎. (21) [Subtitle]: 香氣很高 甜度沒有太甜 可是它桃子味非常的濃. (22) [Subtitle]: 我覺得甜不是重點 重點是那個桃子本身的味道要夠香出來. (23) [Subtitle]: 桃子夭夭 它嚼的時候也非常香. (24) [Subtitle]: 然後表皮呢 也是薄薄脆脆 不會說很厚很刮嘴巴. (25) [Subtitle]: 嗯喜歡.

visual_human_presence.countingEvidence: 2 main female presenters; at least 13 other shoppers and staff visible in the warehouse background.
visual_human_presence.mainCharacterDescription: One woman has long dark hair, wearing a white puff-sleeve top under a black apron. The second woman has shorter hair and wears a white T-shirt and a zebra-print bucket hat.

visual_scene_and_style.backgroundDescribe: The first half is filmed in a Costco warehouse with high ceilings, industrial shelving, and many boxes of produce. The second half is a domestic indoor setting with a white wall, shelves holding plush toys (like Winnie the Pooh and yellow ducks), and a cluttered table.

audio_base.audio_narrative_log: (1) The audio begins with a high-arousal female voice speaking energetically over an upbeat, major-mode acoustic pop BGM with a steady drum beat. The speaker's pitch is moderate-high with frequent upward inflections. (2) A subtle rustling sound of cardboard and plastic is heard as the primary speaker continues her narration about shopping at a warehouse. The BGM remains consistent in the background. (3) A second female voice joins the conversation, having a shorter, reactive tone. A cartoon-style 'pop' sound effect punctuates a transition in the speech. (4) The acoustic environment shifts slightly to a more intimate room tone. Sounds of a peach being bitten and chewed (crunchy, wet textures) are clearly audible. The two women exchange casual, happy remarks about the fruit's flavor and texture. (5) The video concludes with a synthesized 'ding' sound effect as the speakers finalize their review, with the BGM fading out.

narrative_and_purpose.mainPurpose: The video aims to recommend a specific batch of large peaches available at Costco, providing viewers with practical tips on how to select the best fruit (roundness, no bruising, hair density) and validating the quality through a domestic tasting session.

endorsement_analysis.endorsementCues: The video prominently features the Costco logo, specific product pricing (679 TWD), and a positive review of a seasonal product sold at the store.

high_inference.freeDescribe: The video uses a typical social media 'vlog' style with high-density text overlays and upbeat music to maintain engagement while providing consumer information.
